reasoning: The control CM-6(4) focuses on configuration settings and conformance demonstration, specifically related to managed instances and patching compliance in cloud environments. This is typically achieved through cloud-specific services like SSM (Systems Manager) and similar automation tools for managing and patching instances. Kubernetes does not natively manage underlying infrastructure instances in the same way, as it operates at a higher abstraction level focusing on container orchestration. Therefore, this control is not directly applicable to Kubernetes security domains.
title: Configuration Settings - Configuration settings | conformance demonstration [withdrawn
